// Our Purpose

WHY WE BUILT
SONIC AI-PUNCH™

25+
Years Field Experience
0
Defect Tolerance
100%
Digital Traceability

For over 25 years, we worked in real industrial environments — offshore platforms, gas turbines, OSV vessels — where E&I quality directly decides project success or failure.

Through years of field engineering exposure, we observed the same recurring problems:

  • Repetitive manual inspection workflows prone to human error
  • Fragmented diagnostic information across teams
  • Delayed anomaly detection causing costly rework
  • Operational pressure during critical commissioning phases
  • No real-time traceability for QA/QC punch items
⚡

The AI-Punch™ Solution SONIC AI-Punch™ was built to eliminate these failure points — bringing real-time AI-driven QA/QC verification, zero-defect workflows, and instant digital reporting into every E&I project.

25+

Years of Global
E&I Excellence
WATCH: ZERO-DEFECT IN ACTION
// Industrial AI
SONIC AI PLATFORM

On-Time Handover · Zero Defects · Backed by Our Fee
// Innovation

SONIC AI-Punch™

Automated AI-driven QA/QC workflow powered by Google Gemini AI. Real-time inspection data analyzed instantly — eliminating human error through advanced digital verification.

🎯

Precision Detection

AI analyzes photos for crimping defects, loose terminals, FOD, cable management issues, and surface damage in real-time.

📊

Real-time Progress Tracking

Every inspection logged to Supabase with full history, before/after photos, and technician records.

📧

Instant Reporting

Automated email reports sent immediately upon defect resolution — complete with photo evidence and fix verification.

✅

Zero-Error Workflow

Two-step AI screening and confirmation eliminates false positives. No defect passes undetected.

SONIC AI-PUNCH™
STEP 1 / 6
01TAKE PHOTO OR UPLOAD
📷 TAP TO CAPTURE
Capture wiring / component · IEC · Siemens · GE
02AI ANALYZES IMAGE
AI đang quét tổng quát...
Gemini AI · Processing
Initializing Gemini AI...
03GET ERROR CODE
04FIXED ✓ — AI CONFIRMED
✅
FIXED
Correction verified by AI
✓ Technician resolved · AI re-scan confirmed
05REPORT IMMEDIATELY
📧 PDF auto-sent · Photo evidence attached
06SAVED TO CLOUD
INSPECTION COMPLETE · AUDIT-READY
// How It Works

6 Steps

01
Take Photo or Upload
Capture termination or component directly in field
02
AI Analyzes Image
Google Gemini AI scans for defects in under 3 seconds
03
Get Error Code
Exact defect type, location and severity returned instantly
04
FIXED ✓
Technician resolves defect — AI confirms correction
05
Report Immediately
PDF report with photo evidence auto-sent to team
06
Save to Cloud
All results stored — searchable, traceable, audit-ready

// What We Do

ELITE E&I EXECUTION

International standards. Precision results. Right First Time — we don't just finish projects; we deliver integrity.

⚡

Installation & Wiring

Professional E&I installation services meeting GE and Siemens technical specifications on every project.

  • Cable laying & termination
  • Junction box wiring
  • Instrument installation
  • Cable management systems
  • Panel wiring & labeling
⚙️

System Commissioning

End-to-end commissioning services for electrical and instrumentation systems on industrial and energy projects.

  • Loop checking & testing
  • Functional testing
  • Instrument calibration
  • Control system integration
  • Pre-startup safety reviews
🔍

Technical Supervision

On-site supervision and QA/QC management ensuring compliance with international E&I standards.

  • IEC 61084 compliance
  • Siemens specifications
  • Punch-list management
  • AI-assisted inspection
  • Documentation control
🎓

SONIC Academy

Professional E&I training programs built on 25 years of Siemens Energy and GE field experience. Bringing global standards to local engineers.

  • E&I Fundamentals & Technical Diagrams
  • Wiring & Termination Standards
  • Commissioning & Loop Checking
  • AI-Punch™ QA/QC Integration
  • IEC / Siemens / GE Specifications
🤖

QA/QC & PUNCH LIST

AI-powered punch list management and QA/QC inspection using SONIC AI-Punch™ — eliminating human error with real-time photo verification and instant reporting.

  • AI-Punch™ defect detection
  • Digital punch list tracking
  • Photo evidence per item
  • Auto email report on close-out
  • Zero-defect delivery guarantee
🛡️

PRE-STARTUP SAFETY REVIEW

Comprehensive PSSR execution ensuring all E&I systems are safe, compliant and ready for startup — protecting assets, personnel and project timelines.

  • IEC / Siemens / GE compliance audit
  • Hazard identification & risk review
  • Instrument & safety loop verification
  • Formal PSSR documentation
  • Startup authorization sign-off

// Professional Training

SONIC ACADEMY

Professional E&I training programs built on 25 years of field experience with Siemens Energy and GE Turbines. Bringing global standards to local engineers.

01
E&I Fundamentals & Technical Diagrams
Reading P&IDs, single-line diagrams, loop drawings and instrument datasheets to international standards.
02
Wiring & Termination Standards
GE & Siemens specification compliance — cable preparation, crimping, heat-shrink, labeling and torque marking.
03
Commissioning & Loop Checking
Systematic loop checking, instrument calibration and pre-startup safety review procedures.
04
QA/QC & SONIC AI-Punch™ Integration
Hands-on punch-list management using the SONIC AI-Punch™ platform for real-time QA/QC workflows.

// About Us

25 YEARS ON THE
GLOBAL FRONTLINES

SONIC E&I Solutions is a specialist firm delivering precision Electrical & Instrumentation services for the world's most demanding energy projects. Founded by a former Siemens Energy official and GE Owner's Engineer, we bring international standards directly to the field.

"Integrating Global Standards into Local Field Excellence."

From Siemens gas turbines to GE gensets, VIETSOVPETRO offshore platforms to VARD vessel systems — our team has operated at the highest levels of technical integrity across 25+ years.

// Investment Guide

UNDERSTAND THE SCOPE BEFORE YOU CALL

We don't publish fixed prices — every project scope is different. But these reference ranges help you qualify the fit before spending 30 minutes on a call.

AI-PUNCH™ QA/QC
From $8 K
per commissioning package / punch phase
  • ✓ Full AI-Punch™ platform deployment
  • ✓ Photo-verified punch list tracking
  • ✓ Auto close-out report generation
  • ✓ Zero-defect handover — guaranteed
Best fit: projects with 50–2,000+ punch items, GC or PMC oversight required
E&I INSTALLATION
Day rate or lump sum
based on scope, team size, and duration
  • ✓ Cable laying, termination & labeling
  • ✓ Instrument installation & calibration
  • ✓ Panel wiring to GE / Siemens specs
  • ✓ IEC 61084 compliant throughout
Best fit: oil & gas, LNG, power — onshore & offshore, Vietnam & SEA
COMMISSIONING & SUPERVISION
From $1,200
per engineer-day (mobilisation separate)
  • ✓ Loop checking & functional testing
  • ✓ Technical supervision & QA audits
  • ✓ PSSR execution & sign-off
  • ✓ Full documentation package
Best fit: EPC / EPCM needing senior E&I oversight, short- or long-term
📋
HOW TO GET A REAL NUMBER IN 24 HOURS
Send us: (1) project scope or P&ID reference, (2) expected punch item count or cable schedule size, (3) site location & timeline. We reply with a ballpark within one business day — no NDA required for the estimate.
Get Scope Estimate →
// FAQ

QUESTIONS BUYERS ASK

Honest answers to the objections we hear most from procurement and project leads.

Our founder spent 25 years as a senior E&I engineer at Siemens Energy and GE Power — including hands-on roles on PTSC, Cuu Long JOC, and PVEP projects. We aren't trying to match the headcount of a tier-1 contractor; we deliver the same spec compliance with faster decision loops and zero bureaucratic lag. All work is executed to IEC 61084, Siemens TI, and GE EGS standards. References available on request under NDA.
Our guarantee is written into the contract: if any E&I defect attributable to our workmanship is discovered at handover or during the PSSR walkdown, we rectify it at our cost, with no change order. We've maintained a 0-defect handover record across all projects to date — because we use AI-Punch™ to catch issues during construction, not at punch-out. The guarantee isn't marketing language; it's a contractual clause.
No. AI-Punch™ is a mobile-first inspection platform where technicians capture photo evidence per punch item on-site. The system auto-classifies defects by category and severity, assigns ownership, tracks closure status in real time, and generates a timestamped PDF close-out report automatically when all items are resolved. The result: punch list closure time drops ~20% because nothing falls through the gap between site and office. Download the sample report (PDF) to see actual output.
Vietnam-based mobilisation for onshore Vũng Tàu / HCMC projects: typically 3–5 business days from PO. Offshore and out-of-country mobilisation varies by logistics — we'll give you an honest timeline on the call. We keep a core team ready and don't over-book; if we can't commit to your schedule, we'll tell you upfront rather than take the work and miss.
Most clients engage us for one of three reasons: (1) their in-house team lacks Siemens/GE spec experience and needs a qualified supervisor, (2) they're approaching handover and need a neutral QA/QC team to run the punch list — someone the client's PMC will trust, or (3) they want to deploy AI-Punch™ alongside their existing team without rebuilding their process. We're not a replacement; we're a precision add-on for the gaps that create rework costs.
A 1% rework rate on a $10M E&I contract costs $100K in direct labour alone — before demurrage, schedule penalties, or client relationship damage. Our premium over a standard sub is typically 15–25%. The break-even is one avoided rework event. We're not competing on day rate; we're competing on total cost of delivery. If your project has no tolerance for punch list overruns or defect disputes at handover, that's exactly the environment we're built for.
